zh.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London是John Verney的兒子，於1410年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓。他於大約1435年與Emma Piking在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年6月11日在英國倫敦享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London是John Verney的儿子，于1410年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓。他于大约1435年与Emma Piking在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾福利特 馬爾斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年6月11日在英国倫敦享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Verney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Varney  .

variants.name: Varney
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from a French place called Vernay, probably chiefly Saint-Paul-de-Vernay (Calvados). The placename comes from a derivative of Gaulish verno- ‘alder’ + the locative suffix -acum.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mayor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pedro, Agapito, Alberto, Cesar, Cosme, Javier, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Manuel, Orlando.
English (Lancashire): variant of   Mayer   1.
Spanish: nickname for an older man or a distinguishing epithet for the elder of two bearers of the same personal name, from mayor ‘older’, from Latin maior (natus), literally ‘greater (by birth)’.

variants.name: Morgado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Abilio, Acacio, Armando, Mario, Edmundo, Eduardo, Miguel, Adolfo, Alejandra.  Portuguese Henrique.
Portuguese and Spanish: distinguishing name for the eldest son of a family, from Portuguese morgado ‘first-born, heir’, Late Latin maioricatus, a derivative of maior (see Mayor 2).

variants.name: Mayer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Franz, Helmut, Wilhelm, Erwin, Gerhard, Heinz, Ilse, Lorenz, Wolfgang.

English (Staffordshire): post-medieval form of Mear, which is either a topographic name, from Middle English mere ‘pond, pool’ (Old English mere) or Middle English mere ‘boundary’ (Old English (ge)mǣre), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places with names derived from these terms, such as Mere (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Wiltshire), Meir in Caverswall (Staffordshire), and Meare (Somerset).
English: occupational name for a physician, from Old French mire, Middle English mire, meir, meyre, originally synonymous with Myer .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: London
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone who came from London or a nickname for someone who had made a trip to London or had some other connection with the city. In some cases however, the Jewish name was purely artificial. The placename, recorded by the Roman historian Tacitus in the Latinized form Londinium, is obscure in origin and meaning, but may be derived from pre-Celtic (Old European) roots with a meaning something like ‘place at the navigable or unfordable river’.

variants.name: Lonon
meanings: English: probably a variant of   London  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Lundon
meanings: English: variant of   London  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London was born in 1410, in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of John Verney. He married Emma Piking about 1435, in Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 June 1478, in London, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London est né en 1410, à Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de John Verney. Il a épousé Emma Piking environ 1435, à Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1478, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London è nato il nel 1410 nel Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di John Verney. Lui sposato Emma Piking circa 1435, nel Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.Ashridge, Berkshire, England: イギリスバークシュアイアアシュリッジ
ja.St. Martin Pomeroy, London, Middlesex, E: イギリスイギリスロンドンスト オラブ オルド ジュリー ウィス スト マルティン ポメロイ

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of Londonは1410年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストンでJohn Verneyの息子として生まれた。約1435年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアフリート マーストンでEmma Pikingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年6月11日にイギリスロンドンで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト オラブ オルド ジュリー ウィス スト マルティン ポメロイにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Martin Pomeroy, London, Middlesex, E: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London(은)는 1410년 영국 벅잉함실르 플릿 마스턴에서 John Verney의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 플릿 마스턴에서 Emma Piking(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 6월 11일 영국 런던에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London nasceu em 1410, em Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de John Verney. Ele casou-se com Emma Piking aproximadamente 1435, em Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1478, em London, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Martin Pomeroy, London, Middlesex, E: ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London родился в 1410 г. в местности флит марстон, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его отца звали John Verney. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Piking около 1435 г. в местности флит марстон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 июня 1478 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Verney - Lord Mayor of London nació en 1410, en Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John Verney. Se casó con Emma Piking aproximadamente 1435, en Fleet Marston, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de junio de 1478, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
